instructions.when: Once per website / front-end solution. This file sits at the root of the website's solution folder. Each page is a separate file in the same folder (copies of _forms/page.md).
instructions.how: Answer in plain English. Then hand it to Claude using the bridge in claude-only/1-translate-to-claude.md.
instructions.note: Solution = the folder this file sits in.

purpose.question: What is the purpose of this website / front-end?

languageAndFramework.question: What language and framework will it use?

hosting.question: Where will it be hosted?
hosting.example: Azure Static Web Apps, Vercel, Netlify.

overall.question: What is the overall look and feel?
overall.guidance: Link a design system or describe it.

styling.question: What styling approach or component library?

apis.question: Which API(s) does it talk to?
apis.guidance: Name the API solution(s) it calls.

authentication.question: How does it authenticate users?
authentication.example: JWT stored where; which roles/claims gate which pages.

errorLogging.question: How do we log front-end errors?

mustNotDo.question: Anything this solution must NOT do?
